title: Simple Structures: Caves
body:
Adds small decorative structures, shelters, halts, and dungeons to the cave. At the moment, **34** structures have been added

_______________________________________________________________________________________________

![structures from the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c8c6b8f225c3ff4a982fef1bd69af79a876cb32.jpeg)



_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### [All projects are Simple Structures](https://modrinth.com/collection/vinouI3O)


_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### Roadmap
In the future, I plan to add:

```
Compatible with other cave mods
New structures and more variations.
more custom mobs and loot tables
```

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### **Integration:**
- > Vanilla Biome
- > Terralith
- > Biomes O' Plenty


_______________________________________________________________________________________________
